stemHtml: What is the correct statement regarding the scale of a Lambert Conformal Conic projection?

options.a: The distortion in scale further away from the standard parallels should be minimal, compared to the scale printed on the chart.
options.b: The scale within the standard parallels is larger than the given scale in the index of the chart.
options.c: The distortion in scale outside of the standard parallels is much greater (above 5%) than the distortion in scale within the standard parallels.
options.d: The given scale in the index of the chart is valid for the parallel of origin of the chart but for other parts of the chart there is distortion.
